issues.sample: The location of the mirrors causes your rear view to be blocked by the handlebars. I'm 6' 4" and with the handlebars properly adjusted I can't see behind me without changing my body position to be able to see the mirrors clearly.

narrative.headline: What 2021 Can-Am Spyder F3 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Visibility/Wiper (100% of reports).

issues.sample: The location of the mirrors causes your rear view to be blocked by the handlebars. I'm 6' 4" and with the handlebars properly adjusted I can't see behind me without changing my body position to be able to see the mirrors clearly.
issues.title: Visibility/Wiper
